case_title: MUNICIPAL REALTY CORP. VS. KORAY ERGUR et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUNICIPAL REALTY CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT ERGUR, KORAY CP&G INVESTMENT LLC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF NOEL RODRIGUEZ RE INTEREST CALCULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUNICIPAL REALTY CORP.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUNICIPAL REALTY CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ERGUR, KORAY CP&G INVESTMENT LLC $234,542.58 PRINCIPAL, $1,576.43 INTEREST, $410.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $236,529.01, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: SALO, KATHERINE M SUBSTITUTED FOR RODRIGUEZ, NOEL AS ATTORNEY FOR MUNICIPAL REALTY CORP.

ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUNICIPAL REALTY CORP. SERVED NOV-30-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ERGUR, KORAY CP&G INVESTMENT LLC PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON DEC-31-2012 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
POS OF SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUNICIPAL REALTY CORP.
